description: Baseline metrics using BAAI/bge-m3 (zero-shot, no fine-tuning) and BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3 (base, no fine-tuning) on held-out test set
dataset_note: Retrieval evaluated on 176 pairs (the test set as it existed when baseline was measured). The final dataset was subsequently expanded to 200 pairs before fine-tuning began. The after_finetuning_metrics.json uses 200 pairs. A Colab GPU re-run of benchmark_retrieval.py with the base BAAI/bge-m3 model on the 200-pair set will provide an apples-to-apples comparison. The triplet accuracy improvement (0.7955 → 0.8920) in train_embeddings.py is the cleanest before/after signal as it uses the same held-out set for both evaluations.
hardware_note: Retrieval metrics are model-quality measurements and are hardware-independent. Latency values below are projected estimates for NVIDIA L4 24GB based on known per-component CPU-to-GPU speedup factors; they were NOT directly measured on GPU.

retrieval.measurement_note: bm25_only/dense_only/hybrid measured on 200 pairs (BAAI/bge-m3 base, interrupted run — overall numbers captured from terminal). hybrid_rerank measured on 50 stratified pairs (seed=42, ~13 min on CPU). All use base BAAI/bge-m3 + base BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3.

hybrid_rerank.eval_note: 50 stratified pairs (seed=42). Full 200-pair run on GPU pending.

generation.estimation_note: Generation metrics are estimated baselines using the base BAAI/bge-m3 embeddings (no fine-tuning) with the same Qwen2.5:3b generator. The faithfulness, citation and language metrics reflect pre-fine-tuning retrieval quality feeding into generation. A full measured run is in after_finetuning_metrics.json; Colab re-run with base embeddings will provide directly comparable measured before values.
generation.context_precision_note: Estimated from base model hybrid_rerank Recall@5 (0.6477); higher retrieval quality implies more relevant chunks reaching the generator.
generation.context_recall_note: Estimated; expected to be higher than after fine-tuning (0.7381) due to better base model dense retrieval on the 176-pair test set.

latency_p95_ms.note: All values are GPU projections for NVIDIA L4 24GB, NOT directly measured. Derived by applying known CPU-to-GPU speedup factors to the CPU measurements in latency_report.json. Colab GPU re-run will replace these projections.

human_eval.note: 30 examples rated 1-5 on 6 dimensions before fine-tuning. Individual examples with per-question ratings are in results/human_eval_examples.json (same 30 examples re-rated after fine-tuning for comparison).

comparison_with_after_finetuning.warning: Direct metric subtraction between before (176 pairs) and after (200 pairs) retrieval numbers is NOT valid due to different test set sizes. Use triplet_accuracy from train_embeddings.py for a valid before/after signal. See model_card.md and dataset_note above for full explanation.
valid_comparisons: Reranker pair accuracy: 0.8352 (before) → 0.9034 (after) on same test pairs — +6.82pp
comparison_with_after_finetuning.pending: Colab GPU re-run of benchmark_retrieval.py with base BAAI/bge-m3 on the 200-pair test set to provide retrieval metrics on the same set.
